name: baseline_mlp
description: plain GELU MLP (256x6), uniform sampling, Adam

name: fourier_mlp
description: random Fourier features (256, sigma=8) + GELU MLP 512x6, uniform sampling, Adam

name: hashgrid
description: Instant-NGP multiresolution hash grid (16 lvl, F=2, T=2^20, Nmax=4096) + GELU MLP 128x3

name: hashgrid_v2
description: hash grid scaled up (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^21, Nmax=8192) + GELU MLP 256x4

name: hashgrid_adaptive
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^21, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, error-weighted adaptive sampling (4x pool, 50% hard-mining)

name: hashgrid_bank
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^21, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, precomputed 32M-point data bank (no per-step ground-truth recompute)

name: hashgrid_bigT
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, fresh sampling

name: hashgrid_F4
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=4, T=2^21, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, fresh sampling

name: hashgrid_best
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^21, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, error-weighted adaptive sampling (3x pool, 50% mining) + time-based cosine LR

name: hashgrid_replay
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^21, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, 8M churning replay bank (cheap GT) + free hard-mining from stored targets + time-LR

name: hashgrid_amp
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^21, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + time-LR, MIXED PRECISION (bf16 autocast) for throughput

name: hashgrid_ema
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^21, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + time-LR, EMA weights (decay 0.997) evaluated at the end to denoise the tail

name: hashgrid_v3
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^21, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + time-LR, bf16 + 2x mining pool (more steps)

name: hashgrid_bigT_mine
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^21, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + time-LR, T=2^22 + heavy mining (train fine entries via boundary concentration)

name: hashgrid_bigT2
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^21, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + time-LR, T=2^23 + 75% mining (push fine-entry training harder)

name: hashgrid_prog
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + time-LR + progressive coarse-to-fine level unlocking (BARF-style windowing)

name: hashgrid_fast
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^21, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + time-LR, sync-free encoder (no per-level .item) for higher throughput

name: hashgrid_lr
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + split LRs: aggressive table LR (5e-2) + lower MLP LR (5e-3), both cosine-decayed

name: hashgrid_dec
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + split LRs + wider decoder MLP 512x3

name: hashgrid_siren
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + SIREN sine-activated decoder 256x4 (omega0=30), adaptive mining + split LRs (table 5e-2 / MLP 5e-3)

name: hashgrid_ens
description: ensemble of K=2 hash grids (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23) trained on half the budget each, predictions averaged — cancels decorrelated boundary/aliasing error

name: hashgrid_compile
description: hashgrid_lr config + torch.compile to fuse the memory-bound gather/interp/MLP kernels for higher step throughput (fixed shapes -> compiles once)

name: hashgrid_densify
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23) + MLP 256x4, split LRs, ADAPTIVE BOUNDARY DENSIFICATION: jitter model-error 'hard anchors' to oversample the thin boundary curve far denser than uniform; anneal jitter sigma coarse->fine

name: hashgrid_mine50
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + split LRs, 50% mining (test: uniform eval may prefer less mining)

name: hashgrid_smooth
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + split LRs + smoothstep (C1) grid interpolation

name: hashgrid_l16
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + 16 levels (fewer gathers -> more steps)

name: hashgrid_l12
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + 12 levels (push fewer-levels trend)

name: hashgrid_l16F4
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + 16 levels + F=4 features (affordable now)

name: hashgrid_l12p2
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + 12 levels + 2x pool (GT-bound: trade pool for steps)

name: hashgrid_xy
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + 16 levels + raw coord concatenated to grid features

name: hashgrid_bb
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + 12 levels + batch 524k (gather parallelism)

name: hashgrid_bb1m
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + 12 levels + batch 1M

name: hashgrid_bb_lr
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + batch 524k + higher table LR 1e-1

name: hashgrid_bb_lr2
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + batch 524k + table LR 2e-1

name: hashgrid_bb_lr4
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + batch 524k + table LR 4e-1

name: hashgrid_bb_lr8
description: hash grid (24 lvl, F=2, T=2^23, Nmax=8192) + MLP 256x4, adaptive mining + batch 524k + table LR 8e-1
